tasks.subject: Task 1: Lock Protocol + InMemoryLock + LockError/LockTimeout
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Land the lock primitive interface plus an in-memory implementation that all subsequent adapter tests rely on.

**Files:** core/locks.py (new), core/errors.py (append), tests/core/test_locks.py (new).

**Verify:** `pixi run test tests/core/test_locks.py -v` -> 10 passed.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/locks.py", "src/kinoforge/core/errors.py", "tests/core/test_locks.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/core/test_locks.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Lock Protocol runtime-checkable", "InMemoryLock honors blocking/non-blocking semantics", "Expired lease stealable", "LockError/LockTimeout in errors.py", "_sanitize_key replaces / with __"], "tags": ["layer-h"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: ArtifactStore.acquire_lock abstract method + temporary stubs
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add abstract `acquire_lock` to ArtifactStore; NotImplementedError stubs on 3 concrete stores.

**Verify:** `pixi run test tests/stores/test_acquire_lock_contract.py -v` -> 4 passed.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/stores/base.py", "src/kinoforge/stores/local.py", "src/kinoforge/stores/s3/__init__.py", "src/kinoforge/stores/gcs/__init__.py", "tests/stores/test_acquire_lock_contract.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/stores/test_acquire_lock_contract.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["acquire_lock @abstractmethod on ArtifactStore", "Partial subclass cannot instantiate", "ttl_s keyword-only", "NotImplementedError stubs on 3 stores"], "tags": ["layer-h"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: FileLock + LocalArtifactStore.acquire_lock
tasks.description:
**Goal:** fcntl.flock-backed FileLock + LocalArtifactStore wiring; subprocess integration test.

**Verify:** `pixi run test tests/stores/test_file_lock.py -v` -> 6 passed.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/stores/local_lock.py", "src/kinoforge/stores/local.py", "tests/stores/test_file_lock.py", "tests/stores/test_acquire_lock_contract.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/stores/test_file_lock.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["FileLock blocks across processes", "Sidecar JSON has nonce/holder_pid/expires_at", "All seams injectable", "LockTimeout after timeout_s elapsed"], "tags": ["layer-h"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: S3CloudLock + S3ArtifactStore.acquire_lock + FakeS3Client extensions
tasks.description:
**Goal:** S3 conditional-PUT lock; extend FakeS3Client with ETag + IfNoneMatch/IfMatch.

**Verify:** `pixi run test tests/stores/test_s3_lock.py -v` -> 7 passed; existing S3 tests still green.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/stores/s3/lock.py", "src/kinoforge/stores/s3/__init__.py", "tests/stores/conftest.py", "tests/stores/test_s3_lock.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/stores/test_s3_lock.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["put_object uses IfNoneMatch='*'", "TTL expiry triggers steal-via-delete-then-CAS-put", "release uses IfMatch=<etag>", "release silent on stolen-after-TTL", "FakeS3Client preserves existing S3 store test green"], "tags": ["layer-h"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: GCSCloudLock + GCSArtifactStore.acquire_lock + FakeGCSClient extensions
tasks.description:
**Goal:** GCS if_generation_match=0 lock; extend FakeGCSClient with generation tracking + PreconditionFailed.

**Verify:** `pixi run test tests/stores/test_gcs_lock.py -v` -> 7 passed; existing GCS tests still green.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/stores/gcs/lock.py", "src/kinoforge/stores/gcs/__init__.py", "tests/stores/conftest.py", "tests/stores/test_gcs_lock.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/stores/test_gcs_lock.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["upload_from_string uses if_generation_match=0", "TTL expiry triggers steal-via-delete-then-CAS-upload", "release uses if_generation_match=<gen>", "release silent on stolen-after-TTL", "FakeGCSClient preserves existing GCS store test green"], "tags": ["layer-h"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: JsonProfileCache outer-lock wrap + discover_ttl_s
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wrap resolve_or_discover with store.acquire_lock; factor existing threading body into _discover_single_flight.

**Verify:** `pixi run test tests/core/test_profiles.py -v` -> previous + 2 passed.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/profiles.py", "tests/core/test_profiles.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/core/test_profiles.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["discover_ttl_s ctor kwarg", "Cache-hit fast path skips acquire_lock", "Cross-process single-flight: 1 probe across 2 instances", "Existing 4-thread test still green"], "tags": ["layer-h"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Ledger record/forget outer-lock wrap + mutate_ttl_s
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wrap Ledger.record + Ledger.forget with store.acquire_lock; entries() stays lock-free.

**Verify:** `pixi run test tests/core/test_lifecycle_sweeper.py -v` -> previous + 2 passed.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/lifecycle.py", "tests/core/test_lifecycle_sweeper.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/core/test_lifecycle_sweeper.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["mutate_ttl_s ctor kwarg", "record acquires ledger lock", "forget acquires ledger lock", "entries() stays lock-free", "Two Ledger instances over shared registry both succeed", "Docstring updated"], "tags": ["layer-h"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: README Multi-node section + PROGRESS Phase 18 + merge + close #7
tasks.description:
**Goal:** README + PROGRESS docs; full gate; merge --no-ff; close GitHub #7.

**Verify:** `pixi run test -v && gh issue view 7` -> all green + state: CLOSED.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["README.md", "PROGRESS.md", "docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-30-layer-h.md.tasks.json"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test -v && gh issue view 7", "acceptanceCriteria": ["README Multi-node coordination section", "PROGRESS Phase 18 block with per-task SHAs", "L126 residual updated", "GitHub #7 row flipped to CLOSED", "Test count >= 590", "Merge --no-ff to main", "#7 closed"], "tags": ["layer-h"]}
```
